case_title: 17 TH STREET CHIROPRACTIC VS. MARISOL KIM

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 17 TH STREET CHIROPRACTIC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KIM, MARISOL DBA  CORNOCOPIA WELLNESS CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. RES JUDICATA. CASE PREVIOUSLY DECIDED AND JUDGMENT ENTERED ON CSM-18-859161 RODRIGO TAVORA DE OLIVEIRA VS. MARISOL KIM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,224.00 FILED BY 17 TH STREET CHIROPRACTIC AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, MARISOL DBA  CORNOCOPIA WELLNESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-10-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, MARISOL DBA  CORNOCOPIA WELLNESS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) RODRIGO OLIVEIRA, OWNER FILED BY PLAINTIFF 17 TH STREET CHIROPRACTIC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF 17 TH STREET CHIROPRACTIC AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, MARISOL DBA  CORNOCOPIA WELLNESS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF 17TH STREET CHIROPRACTIC, REPRESENTED BY RODRIGO OLIVIERA, OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARISOL KIM IS PRESENT. PARTIES AGREE TO MEDIATION. IT IS DETERMINED THAT A PREVIOUS JUDGMENT BY JUDGE VAN AIKEN WAS ENTERED IN CASE CSM-18-859161 AS TO THE SAME PARTIES AND SIMILAR RELATED ISSUES AND THAT THIS MATTER NEEDS TO BE PRESENTED TO JUDGE ROBERTSON. MATTER IS DETERMINED TO BE RES JUDICATA. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
